wiki7-skin-desc: A beautiful, usable, responsive MediaWiki skin that makes extensions part of the cohesive experience. Initially created for the [https://starwiki7.tools/ Star Wiki7 Wiki].
wiki7.css: /* All CSS here will be loaded for users of the Wiki7 skin */
wiki7.js: /* All JavaScript here will be loaded for users of the Wiki7 skin */
wiki7-preferences-load-error: Couldn't load preferences. Check your connection and try again.
wiki7-notifications-error: Couldn't load notifications. Check your connection and try again.
wiki7-share-qr-scan-hint: Scan to open on another device
wiki7-theme-description: Switch between light and dark mode
wiki7-feature-autohide-navigation-descri: Hide the navigation bar when scrolling down
wiki7-feature-pure-black-description: Replace dark gray backgrounds with pure black
wiki7-feature-custom-font-size-descripti: Change the font size of the body text
wiki7-feature-custom-width-description: Change the width of the content area
wiki7-user-info-text-anon: Your IP address will be publicly visible if you make any edits.
wiki7-user-info-text-anon-temp: If you make an edit, a temporary account will be created for you.
wiki7-user-info-text-temp: This temporary account was created after an edit was made without an account on this browser and device.
wiki7-command-palette-load-error: The command palette couldn't be loaded. Please try again.
wiki7-command-palette-command-file-descr: Find images, PDFs, audio, video and other files
wiki7-command-palette-command-history-de: Browse this page's edit history and jump to a diff.
wiki7-command-palette-command-ns-descrip: Search for a page in a specific namespace
wiki7-command-palette-command-smw-descri: Search using a Semantic MediaWiki query
wiki7-command-palette-mode-action-descri: Find admin actions, special pages, and links pulled from the page menus.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-category-desc: An empty input shows the current page's categories. Select one to step into its subcategories and pages, then press <kbd>Backspace</kbd> on an empty input to back out a level.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-category-empt: Type to search every category on the wiki
wiki7-command-palette-mode-category-nore: Check the spelling or try a different search term
wiki7-command-palette-mode-file-descript: Search the wiki's images, PDFs, audio, and video. Press <kbd>↵</kbd> to open the file's description page.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-file-empty-de: Start typing to search the wiki's media library.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-file-noresult: Try a different keyword or check the spelling.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-history-descr: Browse the current page's recent revisions. Type to filter by editor or edit summary. Press <kbd>↵</kbd> to view a revision.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-history-empty: Open a wiki page to see its history.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-history-nores: Try a different editor name or edit summary keyword.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-history-place: Filter by editor or edit summary
wiki7-command-palette-mode-namespace-des: In the default search, type a namespace prefix like Talk: and it turns into a chip that scopes the rest of your query.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-smw-empty-des: Type conditions like [[Category:City]] or [[Located in::Germany]] to query pages
wiki7-command-palette-mode-smw-malformed: Close your condition with ]] to run the query
wiki7-command-palette-mode-smw-nocategor: Check the category name or try a broader search
wiki7-command-palette-mode-smw-noprintou: Check the property name or try a broader search
wiki7-command-palette-mode-smw-nopropert: Check the property name or try a broader search
wiki7-command-palette-mode-smw-noresults: Try broadening your conditions or check for typos
wiki7-command-palette-mode-smw-descripti: Chain Ask conditions like [[Category:City]] and [[Located in::Germany]] — each completed condition becomes a chip that narrows the query.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-smw-novalues-: Check the value or try a broader search
wiki7-command-palette-mode-user-descript: Each user result has Talk and Contributions action buttons — press → to focus them.
wiki7-command-palette-mode-user-empty-de: Type a username to find user profiles
wiki7-command-palette-mode-user-noresult: Check the spelling or try a different name
wiki7-command-palette-queryaction-fullte: Search the full text of all pages
wiki7-config-usenewtoken: Opt-in switch for the new color token pipeline. Defaults to false; set to true to enable. The new pipeline becomes the default — and legacy is removed — in the next major Wiki7 release.
